title: chrysanthemum scharnhorstii
intro: Chrysanthemum scharnhorstii is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, headaches, and coughs, as it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum scharnhorstii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Chrysanthemum scharnhorstii can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
